languages.text:
"Слуги Золотого Трона — Элане. Немедленно ответьте. Отсутствие связи будет истолковано как содействие Корифею-еретику, вызванное трусостью и попранием священного долга перед человечеством".
{n}Вокс-частоты плохо передают оттенки голоса, но его обладатель определенно встревожен.{/n}

traits.locale_text:
"Слуги Золотого Трона — Элане. Немедленно ответьте. Отсутствие связи будет истолковано как содействие Корифею-еретику, вызванное трусостью и попранием священного долга перед человечеством".
{n}Вокс-частоты плохо передают оттенки голоса, но его обладатель определенно встревожен.{/n}

languages.text:
"Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. Respond immediately. Lack of communication will be construed as aiding the Heretic Coryphaeus due to cowardice and a dereliction of your sacred duty to Humanity."
{n}The vox-frequency does not fully convey the tone of voice, but the speaker is definitely anxious.{/n}

languages.text:
“黄金王座仆从呼叫埃拉娜。请立即回应。若继续失联，将被视为因怯懦而协助异端教首，并背叛了对人类的神圣职责。”
{n}音阵频道虽不能完全传达语气，但说话者显然有些焦躁不安。{/n}
languages.original_text:
"Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. Respond immediately. Lack of communication will be construed as aiding the Heretic Coryphaeus due to cowardice and a dereliction of your sacred duty to Humanity."
{n}The vox-frequency does not fully convey the tone of voice, but the speaker is definitely anxious.{/n}

traits.locale_text:
“黄金王座仆从呼叫埃拉娜。请立即回应。若继续失联，将被视为因怯懦而协助异端教首，并背叛了对人类的神圣职责。”
{n}音阵频道虽不能完全传达语气，但说话者显然有些焦躁不安。{/n}

languages.text:
« Serviteurs du Trône d'Or à Elana. Répondez immédiatement. En l'absence de communication de votre part, nous considérerons que vous avez décidé d'aider le coryphée hérétique pour cause de lâcheté et d'un manquement à votre devoir sacré envers l'humanité. »
{n}Même si la fréquence-vox ne transmet pas toutes les nuances de la voix, il émane du message une anxiété flagrante.{/n}
languages.original_text:
"Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. Respond immediately. Lack of communication will be construed as aiding the Heretic Coryphaeus due to cowardice and a dereliction of your sacred duty to Humanity."
{n}The vox-frequency does not fully convey the tone of voice, but the speaker is definitely anxious.{/n}

languages.text: "Altın Taht'ın hizmetkârlarından Elana'ya. Derhâl yanıt verin. İletişim eksikliği, korkaklığınız ve İnsanlığa karşı kutsal vazifenizi ihmal etmeniz nedeniyle Kâfir Coryphaeus'a yardım etmek olarak yorumlanacaktır." {n}Voks frekansı, ses tonunu tam olarak aktaramıyor ancak konuşmacının endişeli olduğu anlaşılıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text:
"Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. Respond immediately. Lack of communication will be construed as aiding the Heretic Coryphaeus due to cowardice and a dereliction of your sacred duty to Humanity."
{n}The vox-frequency does not fully convey the tone of voice, but the speaker is definitely anxious.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Altın Taht'ın hizmetkârlarından Elana'ya. Derhâl yanıt verin. İletişim eksikliği, korkaklığınız ve İnsanlığa karşı kutsal vazifenizi ihmal etmeniz nedeniyle Kâfir Coryphaeus'a yardım etmek olarak yorumlanacaktır." {n}Voks frekansı, ses tonunu tam olarak aktaramıyor ancak konuşmacının endişeli olduğu anlaşılıyor.{/n}

languages.text:
«Sirvientes del Trono Dorado a Elana. Responda de inmediato. La ausencia de comunicación se interpretará como asistencia al hereje Corifeo debido a la cobardía y como un abandono de su deber sagrado hacia la Humanidad».
{n}La frecuencia de voco no transmite bien el tono de su voz, pero el hablante está claramente nervioso.{/n}
languages.original_text:
"Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. Respond immediately. Lack of communication will be construed as aiding the Heretic Coryphaeus due to cowardice and a dereliction of your sacred duty to Humanity."
{n}The vox-frequency does not fully convey the tone of voice, but the speaker is definitely anxious.{/n}

languages.text:
"Diener des Goldenen Throns an Elana. Meldet Euch umgehend! Ein Mangel an Kommunikation wird als Unterstützung des Ketzers Coryphaeus gedeutet, die auf Feigheit und einem Versäumnis Eurer heiligen Pflicht gegenüber der Menschheit beruht."
{n}Die Voxfrequenz gibt den Tonfall der Stimme nicht vollständig wider, aber der Sprecher hat eindeutig Angst.{/n}
languages.original_text:
"Servants of the Golden Throne to Elana. Respond immediately. Lack of communication will be construed as aiding the Heretic Coryphaeus due to cowardice and a dereliction of your sacred duty to Humanity."
{n}The vox-frequency does not fully convey the tone of voice, but the speaker is definitely anxious.{/n}

languages.text: 「黄金の王座の僕たちへ、エレーナ。すぐに応答せよ。連絡の遅れは、臆病さと人類への聖なる義務の怠慢によって異端のコーリファウスを助けるものとみなされるだろう。」{n}ボイス・周波数は声のトーンを完全に伝えることはできないが、話者は明らかに不安げだ.{/n}
